title: pelargonium × raphanosmon
intro: Pelargonium × raphanosmon, also known as the Apple Geranium or Zesty Rose, is a hybrid plant species that belongs to the Geraniaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its high levels of essential oils, particularly geraniol and limonene, that have anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Pelargonium × raphanosmon include its potential to alleviate symptoms of anxiety and depression, as well as its ability to help manage digestive issues and promote wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and stems are often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions that can be used to support overall health and well-being.
